A Pirate's Adventure ~ Treasures of the.description: An interactive treasure hunt through Adventureland where guests use a magic talisman and map to complete pirate raids and uncover hidden treasures.

Swiss Family Treehouse.description: A self-guided walkthrough of the shipwrecked Swiss Family Robinson's 60-foot treehouse, featuring open-air rooms filled with 19th-century salvaged furnishings.
Swiss Family Treehouse.accessibility: Must climb 116 stairs; not wheelchair accessible

Walt Disney's Enchanted Tiki Room.description: A classic Audio-Animatronic show where over 200 tropical birds, flowers, and tiki figures sing and perform in an immersive Polynesian-themed theater.

Casey Jr. Splash 'N' Soak Station.description: A circus train-themed splash pad where elephants, monkeys, and camels spray water at guests while Casey Jr. lets off billows of refreshing steam.

Cinderella Castle.description: The iconic 189-foot castle landmark featuring a walkthrough mosaic gallery with over a million pieces of Italian glass, real silver, and 14-karat gold.

Enchanted Tales with Belle.description: An interactive storytelling experience where guests journey through Maurice's workshop to Beast's library and help Belle retell her tale with props and costumes.

Mickey's PhilharMagic.description: A 3D concert film where Donald Duck dons Mickey's sorcerer hat and tumbles through classic Disney musical scenes on the world's largest purpose-built 3D screen.

Jessie's Roundup: A Rip-Roarin' Revue!.description: A lively interactive Toy Story experience at the Diamond Horseshoe where guests craft, dance, yodel, and perform alongside Jessie, Woody, and friends.

Main Street Vehicles.description: Vintage transportation along Main Street U.S.A. featuring horse-drawn trolleys, an omnibus, jitney, horseless carriage, and a fire engine.
Main Street Vehicles.accessibility: Must climb steps to board; not wheelchair accessible

Walt Disney's Carousel of Progress.description: A revolving theater show spanning four acts that follows an Audio-Animatronic family through a century of technological progress and everyday life.
